methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Ukrspecsystems operates in Defense & Security at the Growth stage. The valuation universe comprises 10 comparable companies—2 public (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private entities. The private peer set includes Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems, though none represent tight stage or valuation-tier matches. The Defense & Security sector contains 19 identifiable peers overall, but the addressable narrow comp universe is constrained.

Peer-Median valuation methodology is inapplicable. The screening for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier comparables yielded zero datapoints across each filter, falling short of the minimum three-company threshold required for meaningful triangulation. An all-sector median would introduce unacceptable noise and is therefore rejected. No alternative quantitative methods (revenue multiple, DCF, or equity-method calculations) were supported by the provided data.

The analysis cannot generate a defensible valuation range or point estimate. Fundamental constraints—absence of disclosed revenue, EBITDA, or comparable transaction multiples, combined with severe peer scarcity in the relevant subsegment—prevent reliable triangulation. Key uncertainties include the company's current revenue run rate, margins, and the applicability of public-market multiples given Ukrspecsystems' operational and geopolitical risk profile. Further diligence on MoD contract terms, customer concentration, and defense-sector-specific trading multiples is essential before valuation can proceed.
